summary: Merged the authoring + multi-publication surface from the sibling substack-creator CLI: rich drafts create/update (30+ fields), the markdown→ProseMirror draft-body converter (prosemirror.go), posts list --type, and the transcendence commands portfolio, posts twin/best/pair/pairs, subs churn, subs cross-sell, grep (FTS5), schedule board, plus the SQLite store schema they read.
reason: substack-creator (creator JPresting) and substack (creator chirantan) were two CLIs for the same API split by emphasis (authoring/portfolio vs growth/discovery). Consolidated into one substack CLI: substack-creator's hand-authored surface was ported verbatim onto the machine-lifted substack base, with import-path rewrite, chirantan copyright headers (JPresting recorded in contributors[]), the subscribers→subs naming unified, and 4.3.0→4.19.0 client API-drift (context.Context HTTP methods) adapted at the call sites. The substack-creator catalog entry is retired in the same change.
validated_outcome: go build/vet/test (281 pass) + govulncheck clean; all new commands resolve; drafts create exposes 30+ fields; store-backed commands create their tables on open. Original surface authored by JPresting in substack-creator (validated there against three real publications).
